title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 13 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 13 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 13 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/07/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep upward all the day.The main contract closed at 732,increased of 1.53%.Traders are generally motivated to ship, steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and there are few transactions in the market. PBF at Shandong port dealt 755-775 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 773 yuan/mt.Recently, the Industry Department of the National Development and Reform Commission held a coordination and promotion meeting for key domestic iron ore projects, aiming to speed up the development and construction of projects. The top real estate companies announced a month-on-month improvement in sales data, boosting market confidence, and iron ore futures rose late in the session.
